description: Livox Mid-360 LiDAR driver providing point cloud (Camera) and IMU (MovementSensor) data via Livox-SDK2.

models.short_description: point cloud (Camera) for the Livox Mid-360 LiDAR
IMU (MovementSensor) for the Livox Mid-360 LiDAR

build.build: make build && tar -czf module.tar.gz livox-mid-360 meta.json
